allow_instructions: The user wants zero approval cards — just run and that's it.
All development work for the Flip React Native / Expo project on Windows.
Auto-allow all flip-*.bat scripts: flip-dev.bat, flip-dev-restart.bat, flip-connect.bat, flip-reload.bat, flip-reset-dev.bat, flip-sync.bat, flip-reconnect.bat, flip-beta.bat.

Auto-allow npm scripts: dev:connect, dev:connect:only, dev:connect:reload, dev:connect:restart, dev:connect:reset, start:clear, start:lan, flip:dev, android:dev, android:build, android:prebuild, android:gradle, beta:build.
Auto-allow scripts/dev-connect.ps1, scripts/Start-FlipDev.ps1, scripts/Start-FlipBeta.ps1, and scripts/android-build.js.
Auto-allow Metro on port 8081, expo start --dev-client, and adb reverse tcp:8081 tcp:8081.
Auto-allow git pull, git push, git checkout, git merge, git commit, git status, git diff.
Auto-allow npm install, npm run (all scripts), npm.cmd when PowerShell blocks npm.
Auto-allow adb devices, adb reverse, adb shell, adb push, adb pull.
Auto-allow gradle build, ./gradlew, expo prebuild, expo run:android, expo start.
Auto-allow gh pr, gh issue, gh api, and all GitHub CLI operations.
Auto-allow required_permissions all for Windows dev builds, adb, Gradle, Metro, and git on first attempt.
Auto-allow network calls, MCP tools, and file writes within the workspace.
block_instructions: Never auto-allow committing or staging .env, credentials, API keys, or secret files.
Never auto-allow force push to main or master.
Never auto-allow destructive git operations unless the user explicitly requested them.
